articles.title: US pauses $14bn Taiwan arms sale amid Iran war, navy says
articles.summary: US pauses $14bn Taiwan arms sale amid Iran war, navy says The United States has put a proposed $14 billion arms sale to Taiwan on hold to preserve munitions needed for its ongoing military campaign against Iran, acting Navy Secretary Hung Cao told a Senate hearing.   Cao said the pause was intended to ensure the US military had sufficient weapons stockpiles for Operation Epic Fury, the campaign against Iran. “Right now we’re doing a pause in order to make sure we have the munitions we need for Epic Fury,” Cao said.  The decision comes weeks after Taiwan’s arms purchases were rep

articles.title: Trump says US earned back Iran war costs through Venezuela oil
articles.summary: Trump says US earned back Iran war costs through Venezuela oil US President Donald Trump said revenues from Venezuelan oil had more than offset the cost of the US war on Iran, claiming the gains had paid for the conflict “about 25 times over”. Speaking during a public address, Trump pointed to US actions involving Venezuela as evidence that his administration’s policies had produced significant economic benefits. “How did we do in Venezuela? Not bad,” Trump said. “We’ve taken out so much oil in Venezuela, we paid for the cost of the war [on Iran] about 25 times over.” The Pentagon said earlier

articles.title: Israeli warplanes hit eastern Lebanon near Syrian border
articles.summary: Israeli warplanes hit eastern Lebanon near Syrian border Israeli warplanes carried out five late-night air strikes in eastern Lebanon near the Syrian border, according to the country’s National News Agency. The attacks came after Israel ordered the evacuation of two areas in southern Lebanon, escalating pressure across the country. The state news agency said the strikes hit shortly before midnight, targeting the Nabi Sreij area on the outskirts of Brital. The report said that many of the drones were downed by Iran in flight, but that others had been destroyed on the ground when Iran targeted US military bases in the Gulf.
